members.name: _GetLoopCount
members.summary: Overridable method. Should return how many times this audio stream has looped. Most built-in playbacks always return [code]0[/code].

members.name: _GetParameter
members.summary: Return the current value of a playback parameter by name (see [method AudioStream._get_parameter_list]).

members.name: _GetPlaybackPosition
members.summary: Overridable method. Should return the current progress along the audio stream, in seconds.

members.name: _IsPlaying
members.summary: Overridable method. Should return [code]true[/code] if this playback is active and playing its audio stream.

members.name: _Mix
members.signature: public int _Mix(AudioFrame* buffer, float rateScale, int frames)
members.summary: Override this method to customize how the audio stream is mixed. This method is called even if the playback is not active. [b]Note:[/b] It is not useful to override this method in GDScript or C#. Only GDExtension can take advantage of it.

members.name: _Seek
members.summary: Override this method to customize what happens when seeking this audio stream at the given [param position], such as by calling [method AudioStreamPlayer.seek].

members.name: _SetParameter
members.summary: Set the current value of a playback parameter by name (see [method AudioStream._get_parameter_list]).

members.name: _Start
members.summary: Override this method to customize what happens when the playback starts at the given position, such as by calling [method AudioStreamPlayer.play].

members.name: _Stop
members.summary: Override this method to customize what happens when the playback is stopped, such as by calling [method AudioStreamPlayer.stop].

members.name: _TagUsedStreams
members.summary: Overridable method. Called whenever the audio stream is mixed if the playback is active and [method AudioServer.set_enable_tagging_used_audio_streams] has been set to [code]true[/code]. Editor plugins may use this method to "tag" the current position along the audio stream and display it in a preview.

members.name: GetLoopCount
members.summary: Returns the number of times the stream has looped.

members.name: GetPlaybackPosition
members.summary: Returns the current position in the stream, in seconds.

members.name: GetSamplePlayback
members.summary: Returns the [AudioSamplePlayback] associated with this [AudioStreamPlayback] for playing back the audio sample of this stream.

members.name: IsPlaying
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream is playing.

members.name: MixAudio
members.signature: public PackedVector2Array MixAudio(float rateScale, int frames)
members.summary: Mixes up to [param frames] of audio from the stream from the current position, at a rate of [param rate_scale], advancing the stream. Returns a [PackedVector2Array] where each element holds the left and right channel volume levels of each frame. [b]Note:[/b] Can return fewer frames than requested, make sure to use the size of the return value.

members.name: Seek
members.summary: Seeks the stream at the given [param time], in seconds.

members.name: SetSamplePlayback
members.summary: Associates [AudioSamplePlayback] to this [AudioStreamPlayback] for playing back the audio sample of this stream.

members.name: Start
members.summary: Starts the stream from the given [param from_pos], in seconds.
